interaction_phrase: Ph.D. in chemistry from The Hebrew University of Jerusalem
occurrence_sentence: And Keinan is no slouch, either. With a Ph.D. in chemistry from The Hebrew University of Jerusalem, she is an expert leader with years of experience in the field of computational chemistry.

interaction_phrase: bachelor's and master's degree in computer science from the University of North Carolina Wilmington
occurrence_sentence: CTO Shipman, on the other hand, has a bachelor's and master's degree in computer science from the University of North Carolina Wilmington.
Before co-founding POLARISqb, Shipman had a six-year stint as director of cloud computing at Cloud Pharmaceuticals, North Carolina.
